name: Minaurum Gold Inc.
description: Minaurum Silver Inc. is a Canada-based mineral exploration company focused on the acquisition and development of high-grade precious and base metals projects in Mexico and the United States. The company’s primary focus is advancing its flagship Alamos Silver Project in Sonora, Mexico, which is a permitted silver discovery. With a proven technical and financing track record, the Minaurum team has been credited with the discovery of over 300 million ounces of silver and 63 million ounces of gold in the Americas. The company is publicly traded on the TSX Venture Exchange under the ticker symbol MGG.
